allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\('C:/Users/lenovo/.claude/projects/d--Project-Save-frontend-Smaguest/c6304b8f-f8dd-4a9e-9054-d6b28fcbf771.jsonl', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f: for line in f: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'assistant': content = obj.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', []\) for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = block.get\('text', ''\) if 'Priorit' in text and '5.' in text and '6.' in text: print\(text[:4000]\) print\('===FOUND==='\) except: pass ")
